title: The Marines and Pirates Collide

scene: The scene focuses on the marines and pirates collide, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The government? Why would they want to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We just want to go home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: with tears in their eyes, no less.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm not going to leave this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...have anything to do with our alliance....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and take the kids back for himself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He uses large- scale slaughter weapons.

summary: The Marines and Pirates Collide. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
